'''鈭歬-sh-ng''' ('''kashanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kneele|kneele]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kneele|kneele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-sh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kashanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kashangithi|kashangithi]] || [[word:kashangiji|kashangiji]] || [[word:kashangishi|kashangishi]] || [[word:kashangi|kashangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashanguthuth|kashanguthuth]] || [[word:kashangujuj|kashangujuj]] || [[word:kashangushush|kashangushush]] || [[word:kashang|kashang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashanguthu|kashanguthu]] || [[word:kashanguju|kashanguju]] || [[word:kashangushu|kashangushu]] || [[word:kashangu|kashangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashangufuth|kashangufuth]] || [[word:kashangufuj|kashangufuj]] || [[word:kashangufush|kashangufush]] || [[word:kashanguf|kashanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kashangethe|kashangethe]] || [[word:kashangeje|kashangeje]] || [[word:kashangeshe|kashangeshe]] || [[word:kashange|kashange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashangothoth|kashangothoth]] || [[word:kashangojoj|kashangojoj]] || [[word:kashangoshosh|kashangoshosh]] || [[word:kashang|kashang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashangotho|kashangotho]] || [[word:kashangojo|kashangojo]] || [[word:kashangosho|kashangosho]] || [[word:kashango|kashango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashangofoth|kashangofoth]] || [[word:kashangofoj|kashangofoj]] || [[word:kashangofosh|kashangofosh]] || [[word:kashangof|kashangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kashang忙th忙|kashang忙th忙]] || [[word:kashang忙j忙|kashang忙j忙]] || [[word:kashang忙sh忙|kashang忙sh忙]] || [[word:kashang忙|kashang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashangathath|kashangathath]] || [[word:kashangajaj|kashangajaj]] || [[word:kashangashash|kashangashash]] || [[word:kashang|kashang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashangatha|kashangatha]] || [[word:kashangaja|kashangaja]] || [[word:kashangasha|kashangasha]] || [[word:kashanga|kashanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashangafath|kashangafath]] || [[word:kashangafaj|kashangafaj]] || [[word:kashangafash|kashangafash]] || [[word:kashangaf|kashangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kashangasha|kashangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokashangasha|gokashangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikashangasha|gokikashangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kashangn眉sha|kashangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokashangnkn眉sha|gokashangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikashangn眉sha|gokikashangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kashangsh毛sha|kashangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokashangnksh毛sha|gokashangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikashangsh毛sha|gokikashangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kashangrosha|kashangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokashangnkrosha|gokashangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikashangrosha|gokikashangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kashangmusha|kashangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokashangnkmusha|gokashangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashangmusha|gokikashangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kashangsherasha|kashangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokashangnksherasha|gokashangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikashangsherasha|gokikashangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kashangasha|kashangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokashangnkngasha|gokashangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikashangasha|gokikashangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kashangyasha|kashangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokashangnkyasha|gokashangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikashangyasha|gokikashangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kashangyamasha|kashangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokashangnkyamasha|gokashangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikashangyamasha|gokikashangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kashangn眉sh毛sha|kashangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokashangnkn眉sh毛sha|gokashangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikashangn眉sh毛sha|gokikashangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kashangn眉rosha|kashangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokashangnkn眉rosha|gokashangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikashangn眉rosha|gokikashangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashangn眉musha|kashangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokashangnkn眉musha|gokashangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashangn眉musha|gokikashangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kashangsh毛n眉sha|kashangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokashangnksh毛n眉sha|gokashangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikashangsh毛n眉sha|gokikashangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kashangsh毛rosha|kashangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokashangnksh毛rosha|gokashangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikashangsh毛rosha|gokikashangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashangsh毛musha|kashangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokashangnksh毛musha|gokashangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashangsh毛musha|gokikashangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kashangron眉sha|kashangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokashangnkron眉sha|gokashangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikashangron眉sha|gokikashangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kashangrosh毛sha|kashangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokashangnkrosh毛sha|gokashangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikashangrosh毛sha|gokikashangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kashangromusha|kashangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokashangnkromusha|gokashangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikashangromusha|gokikashangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kashangmun眉sha|kashangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokashangnkmun眉sha|gokashangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikashangmun眉sha|gokikashangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kashangmush毛sha|kashangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokashangnkmush毛sha|gokashangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikashangmush毛sha|gokikashangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kashangmurosha|kashangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokashangnkmurosha|gokashangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikashangmurosha|gokikashangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kashang|kashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:k忙sh忙ng|k忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokashang|hokashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hok忙sh忙ng|hok忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokashang|hohokashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohok忙sh忙ng|hohok忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉kashang|n眉kashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉k忙sh忙ng|n眉k忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉kashang|n眉n眉kashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉k忙sh忙ng|n眉n眉k忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂kashang|n茂kashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂k忙sh忙ng|n茂k忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂kashang|n茂n茂kashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂k忙sh忙ng|n茂n茂k忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukashang|lukashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luk忙sh忙ng|luk忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukashang|lulukashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluk忙sh忙ng|luluk忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likashang|likashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lik忙sh忙ng|lik忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikashang|lilikashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilik忙sh忙ng|lilik忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokashang|kokashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kok忙sh忙ng|kok忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokashang|kokokashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokok忙sh忙ng|kokok忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekashang|kekashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kek忙sh忙ng|kek忙sh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekashang|kekekashang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekek忙sh忙ng|kekek忙sh忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
